title: European Structural and Investment Funds: UK partnership agreement, 2014 to 2020
body: "This partnership agreement sets out the UK plans and priorities for the European Structural and Investment Funds from 2014 to 2020. EU regulation requires all EU member states to produce a partnership agreement before they can start spending their allocations of the funds.   The UK’s amended Partnership Agreement was adopted by the European Commission on 7 April 2020.   Related documents  See the draft UK proposal submitted to the European Commission on 17 April 2014.  "
